title: Rename device - old FW no rename, new FW rename present
scenario: Verify that the "Device Name" setting is absent in Device Settings > General on old firmware and appears after updating to new firmware on supported devices.
steps: 1. Ensure the device is on old firmware.
3. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting is NOT present.
4. Update the device to new firmware.
5. Navigate to Device Settings > General again.
6. Verify that the 'Device Name' setting IS now present.
expected: The "Device Name" setting should NOT appear in Device Settings > General on old firmware, and SHOULD appear after updating to new firmware.
